records.content_snippet:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>

    <!-- Transaction Log Tree View -->
    <record id="sanal_pos_transaction_log_tree" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">sanal.pos.transaction.log.tree</field>
        <field name="model">sanal.pos.transaction.log</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <tree decoration-danger="not is_success" decoration-success="is_success"
                  default_order="create_date desc">
                <field name="create_date"/>
                <field name="transaction_id"/>
                <field name="provider_id"/>
                <field name="log_type"/>
                <field name="direction"/>
                <field name="url" optional="hide"/>
                <field name="http_status"/>
                <field name="duration_ms"/>
                <field name="is_success"/>
                <field name="error_message" optional="show"/>
            </tree>
        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- Transaction Log Form View -->
    <record id="sanal_pos_transaction_log_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">sanal.pos.transaction.log.form</field>
        <field name="model">sanal.pos.transaction.log</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <form>
                <sheet>
                    <group>
                        <group>
                            <field name="create_date"/>
                            <field name="transaction_id"/>
                            <field name="provider_id"/>
                            <field name="log_type"/>
                            <field name="direction"/>
                        </group>
                        <group>
                            <field name="url"/>
                            <field name="http_status"/>
                            <field name="duration_ms"/>
                            <field name="is_success"/>
                            <field name="ip_address"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                    <notebook>
                        <page string="İstek Verisi">
                            <field name="request_data" widget="text"/>
                        </page>
                        <page string="Yanıt Verisi">
                            <field name="response_data" widget="text"/>
                        </page>
                        <page string="Hata" invisible="not error_message">
                            <field name="error_message" widget="text"/>
                        </page>
                    </notebook>
                </sheet>
            </form>
        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- Transaction Log Search View -->
    <record id="sanal_pos_transaction_log_search" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">sanal.pos.transaction.log.search</field>
        <field name="model">sanal.pos.transaction.log</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <search>
                <field name="transaction_id"/>
                <field name="provider_id"/>
                <field name="log_type"/>
                <filter name="errors" string="Hatalar" domain="[('is_success','=',False)]"/>
                <filter name="success" string="Başarılı" domain="[('is_success','=',True)]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter name="today" string="Bugün"
                        domain="[('create_date','>=', (context_today()).strftime('%%Y-%%m-%%d'))]"/>
                <group expand="0" string="Grupla">
                    <filter name="group_type" string="Log Tipi"
                            context="{'group_by':'log_type'}"/>
                    <filter name="group_provider" string="Provider"
                            context="{'group_by':'provider_id'}"/>
                    <filter name="group_day" string="Gün"
                            context="{'group_by':'create_date:day'}"/>
                </group>
            </search>
        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- Transaction Log Action -->
    <record id="action_sanal_pos_transaction_log" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="name">İşlem Logları</field>
        <field name="res_model">sanal.pos.transaction.log</field>
        <field name="view_mode">tree,form</field>
        <field name="context">{'search_default_today': 1}</field>
    </record>

</odoo>
